subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto them that have believed in God, the Lord of all worlds, and have hearkened unto the Call when it was raised in truth, and have turned towards it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن آمن بالله رب العالمین و سمع الندآء اذ ارتفع بالحق و اقبل الی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prophecy and fulfillment, @consolation and comfort
